name: Lo-Cal Cheese Broiled Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice tomatoes in half crosswise.
2. Combine the cheese, milk, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, and oregano in a saucepan. Heat until the cheese melts.
3. Place the tomatoes on foil-lined broiler pan.
4. Pour the cheese mixture over the tomatoes.
5. Broil 3-inches from the heat for 5 to 7 minutes.
Makes 6 servings; contains 98 calories per serving.
